summary: Iteration 220 — refactor of 5 client view tabs + 8 nav removals. ALL 10/10 acceptance criteria PASS. (1) Adviser sidebar (app_mode='adviser', /advisor-command-center) contains ZERO of the 8 forbidden items: Webhooks, Budget Exposure, Execution Rails, Advice Marketplace, API Platform, API Sandbox, Firm Branding, Marketplace. (2) Regression OK: Client Hub, New Client, Xplan Sync Hub, Activity, Roles, Compliance, Settings all still present (Dashboard + Client Overview live in the 'Today' group also rendered — verified in navData.js source lines 39-40). (3) All 8 removed-from-nav deep-link routes still load: /webhooks-admin (5359 chars), /budget-exposure (2177), /execution-rails (4672), /advice-marketplace (2609), /open-api-platform (1193), /developer-sandbox (801), /firm-branding (864), /product-marketplace (544). (4) Snapshot tab: [data-testid='client-net-worth']='$9,610,000' with classes 'font-serif text-5xl text-[#1a2744] mt-2 tabular-nums'; parent container = 'lg:col-span-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-7' — confirmed NO 'bg-gradient-to-br' and NO 'from-[#1a2744]'. (5) Retirement tab: confidence card 'rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-8 text-center' (no gradient), font-serif 99%, 5 rounded-xl bordered super-metric cards, 0 bg-gray-50 hits. (6) Budget tab: 5 rounded-xl border-slate-200 cards visible, 0 bg-gray-50, MONTHLY IN / MONTHLY OUT / MONTHLY SAVED labels rendered with font-serif values + screenshot matches airy aesthetic. (7) Investments tab: 15 border-slate-100 dividers + 24 font-mono values, 0 bg-gray-50. (8) Tax tab: 6 rounded-xl border-slate-200 cards (4 metric + 2 wrapper), 0 bg-gray-50, GROSS INCOME / SUPER SALARY-SAC / EST. TAX + MEDICARE / NET (AFTER TAX) visible. (9) Zero console errors across all 5 tab navigations. (10) /advisor-command-center renders [data-testid='page-shell'] + 'Command center' title.
critical_code_review_comments: navData.js cleanup is clean — lucide imports trimmed and only 5 Firm-group items remain. No dead imports surfaced.

All 5 clientView/*.jsx tabs now use a consistent aesthetic: 'rounded-2xl/xl border border-slate-200 bg-white' + 'font-serif text-[#1a2744] tabular-nums' for primary numbers and 'font-mono' for table rows — matches the adviser PageShell pattern cleanly.
Deep-link routes for removed nav items are still registered in AppRouter, so URL bookmarks and external embeds continue to work — good defensive design.
test_credentials: None. LocalStorage bypass: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser'|'client'. Client tabs auto-default to thompson_family.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 220 fully green. Adviser Firm-group nav now has exactly 5 items (Xplan Sync Hub, Activity, Roles, Compliance, Settings). 8 routes intentionally kept registered for deep-link only (no nav entry): /webhooks-admin, /budget-exposure, /execution-rails, /advice-marketplace, /open-api-platform, /developer-sandbox, /firm-branding, /product-marketplace. 5 clientView tabs (SnapshotTab, RetirementTab, BudgetTab, InvestmentsTab, TaxTab) all refactored to airy white/serif aesthetic — NO navy gradient, NO bg-gray-50, ALL primary numbers use 'font-serif text-[#1a2744] tabular-nums'. data-testid present on net-worth ('client-net-worth') and retirement confidence ('client-retirement-confidence'). Tab triggers: client-tab-snapshot/retire/invest/budget/goals/tax. NB: innerText returns uppercase-rendered text because of CSS 'uppercase' classes — when asserting on tab labels use case-insensitive checks. Zero console errors observed.
